training_status: immobilized, wheelchair-bound, unable to walk without aids
protocol_notes: User's wife recovering from pubic bone fracture and bilateral tendonitis. BPC-157 currently in use orally; user prefers subcutaneous injection but wife is hesitant. Also using Essential Amino Acids, Aloe Vera Extract, multivitamin, Vitamin D/K, calcium, and prioritizing protein intake. Considering: SARM (Ostarine, S4, LGD4033), AAS (Nandrolone/Anavar), peptides (CJC-1295, Tesamorelin, Ipamorelin), MK-677, red light therapy, ultrasound, vibration therapy, Retatrutide (long-term for weight management), and bioregulators (Bone Marrow). General practitioner unsupportive of proposed interventions.
